heading: Fees for rabies diagnoses; disposition of moneys
label: 395 Fees for rabies diagnoses; disposition of moneys
text: Fees shall be charged for all diagnoses in connection with rabies, except those performed for agencies of the United States Government, in such amounts as the Secretary shall prescribe, and such fees shall be covered into the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior Department of Agriculture Appropriation Acts:, .June 28, 1944, ch. 29658 Stat. 433, .July 12, 1943, ch. 21557 Stat. 401, .July 22, 1942, ch. 51656 Stat. 674
